title: Specialized Agent Guardrails Execution Root
description: Non-runnable feature container for the shared execution root coordinating template-backed guardrails, blocked role-scope outcomes, visibility updates, and downstream validation for specialized agents.
acceptance_criteria: The feature tree decomposes template loading, worker prompt updates, blocked role-scope handling, visibility, testing, documentation, and review into actionable child beads.
All concrete implementation work is delegated to child beads with clear dependencies and scoped file ownership.
The shared execution root preserves the spec context for all child beads.
